toast.trfp.sub.final_level: Mand og pistol bliver til en
commands.trfp.reload.overwrite_on: §a§l●§r Nu hvor overskrivningskonfigurationen er aktiveret, vil §6alle ændringer i trfp standardvåbenpakken være §lnulstillet!
commands.trfp.reload.overwrite_off: §a§l●§r Nu hvor overskrivningskonfigurationen er slået fra, §6er du§lfri til at Modificere§6 trfp standart våbenpakken!
commands.trfp.reload.backup: §a§l●§r Du kan finde de overskrevne filer i §c§nconfig/trfp/backup§r mappen
commands.trfp.reload.overwrite_command.o: §a§l● §r Du kan bruge kommandoen §c§n/trfp overwrite false§r for at deaktivere overskrivnings funktionen.
§a§l●§r Du kan bruge kommandoen §c§n/trfp overwrite true§r for at aktivere overwrite funktionen.
commands.trfp.config.default_table_limit: §a§l[TRfP]§r Standard Våbenbord opskrifts grænse er aktiveret.
§a§l[TRfP]§r Standard Våbenbord opskrifts grænse er deaktiveret.
commands.trfp.config.server_shoot_networ: §a§l[TRfP]§r Server-side skud netværks check er aktiveret.
§a§l[TRfP]§r Server-side skud netværks check er deaktiveret.
commands.trfp.config.server_shoot_cooldo: §a§l[TRfP]§r Server-side skud cooldown check er aktiveret.

§a§l[TRfP]§r Server-side skud cooldown check er deaktiveret.
 §6ADVARSEL: Dette vil deaktivere nedkølingskontrollen i server-siden, hvilket kan føre til potentiale for snyd. Overvej kun at lukke dette, når du ofte ikke kan skyde.
message.trfp.convert_from_legacy.intro: TRfP har opgraderet våbenpakkernes format, gamle våbenpakkers formater er forældet og kan ikke længere bruges.
message.trfp.convert_from_legacy.intro2: For gamle våbenpakkeformater, har du brug for at konvertere dem til fortsat brug.
message.trfp.convert_from_legacy: Find gamle våbenpakkeformater. Vil du konvertere dem nu?
message.trfp.convert_from_legacy.hint: Du kan også bruge kommandoen §c§n/trfp convert§r, den vil til enhver tid forsøge at konvertere alle gamle våbenpakker i den gamle mappe.
message.trfp.convert_from_legacy.hover: Klik for at konvertere gamle våbenpakker i den gamle mappe
message.trfp.convert_from_legacy.hide: Hvis du ikke ønsker at se denne meddelelse igen, så omdøb venligst den gamle våbenpakkemappe.
message.trfp.converter.start: Start to convert old gun packs... §c§lPLEASE DO NOT INTERRUPT THE GAME!!!§r
message.trfp.converter.pack.failed: Failed to convert %s, check the log for more details, skip...
message.trfp.converter.pack.folder: Folder format pack %s can not be converted, if you need convert it please zip it first, skipped...
message.trfp.converter.finish: Convert finished! Total Time: %d ms. Success: %d. Skipped: %d. Failed: %d. Please §c§lRESTART THE GAME§r to take effect!

gui.trfp.cloth_config_warning.tips: Du skal installere Cloth Config API modifikationen for at bruge ingame konfigurationsfunktionen
gui.trfp.client_gun_pack_downloader.fail: Tjek internetforbindelsen, eller afslut spillet og start spillet igen
tooltip.trfp.ammo_box.usage.deposit: - Deposit Ammo: Pick up the box in the inventory and right-click on the ammo
tooltip.trfp.ammo_box.usage.remove: - Remove Ammo: Pick up the box in the inventory and right-click on the empty slot
tooltip.trfp.ammo_box.usage.creative.1: Pick up the box in the inventory and right-click on the ammo
tooltip.trfp.ammo_box.usage.creative.2: Then an unlimited amount of ammo of that type can then be supplied
tooltip.trfp.ammo_box.usage.all_type_cre: It is directly possible to supply unlimited ammo for all types
tooltip.trfp.gun.tips: <<< Tryk på %s i spillet for Vedhæftninger >>>
tooltip.trfp.attachment.yaw.shift: Press [Shift] to see the support guns
jei.trfp.attachment_query.title: Attachment Query
config.trfp.client.key.hold_to_aim.desc: True if you want to hold the right mouse button to aim
config.trfp.client.key.hold_to_crawl.des: True if you want to hold the crawl button to crawl
config.trfp.client.key.auto_reload.desc: Try to reload automatically when the gun is empty
config.trfp.client.render.gun_lod_render: How far to display the lod model, 0 means always display
config.trfp.client.render.bullet_hole_pa: The existence time of bullet hole particles, in tick
config.trfp.client.render.damage_counter: Damage counter reset time of target minecart, in millisecond
config.trfp.client.render.bullet_hole_pa: The threshold for fading out when rendering bullet hole particles
config.trfp.client.render.hit_market_sta: The starting position of the hit marker when kill
config.trfp.client.render.head_shot_debu: Whether or not to display the head shot's hitbox
config.trfp.client.render.gun_hud_enable: Whether or not to display the gun's HUD
config.trfp.client.render.kill_amount_en: Whether or not to display the kill amount
config.trfp.client.render.kill_amount_du: The duration of the kill amount, in second
config.trfp.client.render.crosshair_type: Crosshairet, når du holder et Våben
config.trfp.client.render.target_render_: Den længste render afstand af målet, herunder Minevogn typer
config.trfp.client.render.first_person_b: Hvorvidt der skal vises første persons kuglespor eller ej
config.trfp.client.render.disable_intera: Deaktivér den interaktive hud tekst i midten af skærmen
config.trfp.client.render.auto_select_gu: Auto Filter Gun Smith Table By Held Item
When opening a gun smith table with a gun, attachment, or ammo in your main hand, automatically select the held item filter.
config.trfp.client.render.disable_moveme: Disable all fov effect from the movement speed attribute while holding a gun.
config.trfp.client.render.enable_translu: Should enable translucent while rendering block entity like gunsmith table or statue. Enable this option will result in ADDITIONAL PERFORMANCE OVERHEAD.
config.trfp.client.resource.enable_lazy_: Build heavy client assets such as models and animation state machines on demand. Inventory items are pre-warmed in the background when possible.
config.trfp.client.sound.hit_sound_concu: Max active hit feedback sounds for the same entity and sound id. 0 disables this limit.
config.trfp.client.sound.default_sound_c: Max active normal gun sounds for the same entity and sound id. 0 disables this limit.
config.trfp.client.sound.high_frequency_: Max active high-frequency gun sounds, such as shooting and animation keyframe sounds, for the same entity and sound id. 0 disables this limit.
config.trfp.client.zoom.screen_distance_: Skærmafstandskoefficient for zoom, ved hjælp af MDV standard, standarten er MDV133
config.trfp.common.gun.default_gun_silen: Default Gun Silencer Fire Sound Distance
The silencer default fire sound range (block)
config.trfp.common.gun.default_gun_other: Rækkevidden (blok) af anden våbenlyd, genindladningslyd osv.
config.trfp.common.gun.creative_player_c: Hvorvidt spilleren vil forbruge ammunition i kreativ tilstand eller ej
config.trfp.common.gun.auto_reload_when_: Auto reload all the guns in player inventory, useful for pvp servers
config.trfp.common.ammo.explosive_ammo_d: Warning: Ammo with explosive properties can break blocks
config.trfp.common.ammo.explosive_ammo_f: Warning: Ammo with explosive properties can set the surroundings on fire
config.trfp.common.ammo.explosive_ammo_k: Ammo with explosive properties can add knockback effect
config.trfp.common.ammo.explosive_ammo_v: The distance at which the explosion effect can be seen
config.trfp.common.ammo.pass_through_blo: Those blocks that the ammo can pass through
config.trfp.common.ammo.destroy_glass.de: Whether a ammo can break the glass
config.trfp.common.ammo.ignite_block.des: Whether a ammo can ignite the block
config.trfp.common.ammo.ignite_entity.de: Whether a ammo can ignite the entity
config.trfp.common.ammo.global_speed_mod: The init speed of all bullet will be multiplied by this value
config.trfp.common.other.default_pack_de: When enabled, the reload command will not overwrite the default model file under config
config.trfp.common.other.target_sound_di: The farthest sound distance of the target, including minecarts type
config.trfp.common.other.enable_table_fi: Enable the recipe limit of default gunsmith table or not
config.trfp.client.render.enable_tooltip: Display the gun/ammo/attachment id in item tooltip when advanced tooltip(F3+H) is on.
Whether or not apply fadeout effect on the laser beam. Close this may improve laser performance under some shaders.
